'''鈭歬-t-dh-h''' ('''kakatdhehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:phenotype|phenotype]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-t-dh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phenotype|phenotype]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-t-dh-h
|-
! Lemma
| kakatdhehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikatdhehoko|thikatdhehoko]] || [[word:jikatdhehoko|jikatdhehoko]] || [[word:shikatdhehoko|shikatdhehoko]] || [[word:kikatdhehoko|kikatdhehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukatdhehoko|thuthukatdhehoko]] || [[word:jujukatdhehoko|jujukatdhehoko]] || [[word:shushukatdhehoko|shushukatdhehoko]] || [[word:kukukatdhehoko|kukukatdhehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukatdhehoko|thukatdhehoko]] || [[word:jukatdhehoko|jukatdhehoko]] || [[word:shukatdhehoko|shukatdhehoko]] || [[word:kukatdhehoko|kukatdhehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukatdhehoko|thukatdhehoko]] || [[word:jukatdhehoko|jukatdhehoko]] || [[word:shukatdhehoko|shukatdhehoko]] || [[word:kukatdhehoko|kukatdhehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekatdhehoko|thekatdhehoko]] || [[word:jekatdhehoko|jekatdhehoko]] || [[word:shekatdhehoko|shekatdhehoko]] || [[word:kekatdhehoko|kekatdhehoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokatdhehoko|thokatdhehoko]] || [[word:jokatdhehoko|jokatdhehoko]] || [[word:shokatdhehoko|shokatdhehoko]] || [[word:kokatdhehoko|kokatdhehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokatdhehoko|thokatdhehoko]] || [[word:jokatdhehoko|jokatdhehoko]] || [[word:shokatdhehoko|shokatdhehoko]] || [[word:kokatdhehoko|kokatdhehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙katdhehoko|th忙katdhehoko]] || [[word:j忙katdhehoko|j忙katdhehoko]] || [[word:sh忙katdhehoko|sh忙katdhehoko]] || [[word:k忙katdhehoko|k忙katdhehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakatdhehoko|thathakatdhehoko]] || [[word:jajakatdhehoko|jajakatdhehoko]] || [[word:shashakatdhehoko|shashakatdhehoko]] || [[word:kakakatdhehoko|kakakatdhehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakatdhehoko|thakatdhehoko]] || [[word:jakatdhehoko|jakatdhehoko]] || [[word:shakatdhehoko|shakatdhehoko]] || [[word:kakatdhehoko|kakatdhehoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
